text.value: The current weather in New York, NY is sunny with a temperature of 23°C (74°F). It feels like 24°C (76°F). There is no cloud cover, and the humidity is at 38%. The wind is blowing from the west at 10 km/h (6 mph). Visibility is excellent at 16 km (9 miles), and the UV index is 7, indicating a high level of UV radiation.
What is the weather in New York, NY?
